name: Pork Shiu My
recipeIngredient: A few drops of alkali water
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the pastry dough: Sift the plain flour and high protein flour on a clean surface. Create a well in the center and add beaten eggs, alkali water, and gradually mix in the flour until it forms a soft dough. Roll into a long thin cylinder, cut into small equal portions (about 3.5g each), and press each round with a rolling pin. Dust with cornflour to prevent sticking.
2. Prepare the filling: Wash, devein, and dry shrimps. Dice pork meat. Sauté mushrooms. Blanch and dice carrots. Mix all ingredients in a bowl until firm, then add seasoning (salt, sugar, light soy sauce, sesame oil), pepper, cornflour, and water to make it springy.
3. Assemble the dumplings: Place a piece of pastry on your left palm. Add about 1.5 teaspoons of filling in the center. Gradually fold in the edges, leaving the top open. Smooth the surface with a knife and garnish with minced carrot or parsley.
4. Steam the dumplings: Grease a steamer and place the pork shui my inside. Steam over high heat for 10 minutes. Remove and serve hot.
